_description: Baseline allocation templates per macro regime. These are starting points — the trade reasoner adjusts based on specific instance data (credit conditions, positioning, policy stance). All weights are percentages of total portfolio. Must sum to ~100.
_usage: T1 reads the current regime from the macro advisor synthesis, then T2 uses this template as the strategic allocation baseline before applying thesis overlays.

Goldilocks._description: Growth rising, inflation falling. Best environment for risk assets. Duration benefits from falling inflation. Broad equity exposure, favor growth.

US_small_cap.rationale: Small caps benefit from growth acceleration

emerging_markets.rationale: EM benefits from global growth + weak USD trend

gold.rationale: Reduced allocation — less need for hedges

real_estate.rationale: REITs benefit from falling rates + growth

Overheating._description: Growth rising, inflation rising. Equities can still work but favor value over growth. Duration suffers. Commodities and real assets benefit.

US_large_cap_value.rationale: Value outperforms growth when inflation rising

US_small_cap.rationale: Small caps still benefit from growth

long_duration.rationale: Duration is the enemy when inflation rising

short_duration.rationale: Park bond allocation in short duration

high_yield.rationale: HY okay if growth strong, but watch spreads

Disinflationary Slowdown._description: Growth falling, inflation falling. Classic risk-off. Duration wins big. Defensive equities. Gold as safe haven. Reduce cyclical exposure.

long_duration.rationale: Duration is king — rates falling with inflation and growth

investment_grade.rationale: IG benefits from rate decline, watch credit quality

tips.rationale: Inflation protection not needed — deflation risk

real_estate.rationale: REITs can work if rate cuts come fast

Stagflation._description: Growth falling, inflation rising. Worst environment. Cash is king. Gold. Short duration. Minimal equity. Commodities only if supply-driven.

US_large_cap_value.rationale: If holding equity, value over growth

US_large_cap_energy.rationale: Energy benefits from inflation if supply-driven

short_duration.rationale: Park in short duration — no rate risk

tips.rationale: Inflation protection with lower duration than nominal bonds

high_yield.rationale: Credit risk highest in stagflation — avoid

real_estate.rationale: Rising rates + slowing growth = worst for REITs

_liquidity_modifiers._description: Weight adjustments applied on top of the regime family template based on liquidity condition. Ample liquidity favors risk assets and duration; tight liquidity favors defensive positioning and cash. Applied as additive percentage point changes. The modified portfolio is then renormalized to sum to ~95%.
_liquidity_modifiers._usage: T2 reads the regime_family template as the base, then adds the appropriate modifier set. For example, Goldilocks base (QQQ=20%) + ample modifier (risk_assets=+3) → QQQ adjusted to ~23% before renormalization.

ample._description: Ample liquidity: M2 above trend, NFCI below trend (looser), Fed balance sheet expanding. Favors risk-on tilt.

_rules.risk_assets: Add risk_assets_tilt to each equity bucket (SPY, QQQ, IWM, VTV, EFA, EEM). Proportional to existing weight — zero-weight buckets stay at zero.
_rules.duration: Add duration_tilt to long-duration (TLT) or IG credit (LQD). Reduces short-duration (SHV) by same amount.
_rules.cash: Reduce cash (SGOV) by abs(cash_tilt). If SGOV would go below 2%, cap at 2%.
_rules.credit: Add credit_tilt to HYG and/or LQD.
_rules.gold: Adjust GLD by gold_tilt. Ample liquidity reduces the need for safe haven.
_rules.renormalize: After applying all tilts, rescale so total = 95%. No bucket goes below 0%.

tight._description: Tight liquidity: M2 below trend, NFCI above trend (tighter), Fed balance sheet contracting. Favors defensive tilt.

_rules.risk_assets: Reduce each equity bucket by abs(risk_assets_tilt). Proportional to existing weight — zero-weight buckets stay at zero.
_rules.duration: Reduce long-duration (TLT) by abs(duration_tilt). Add to short-duration (SHV).
_rules.credit: Reduce HYG and/or LQD by abs(credit_tilt).
_rules.gold: Adjust GLD by gold_tilt. Tight liquidity increases need for safe haven.
_rules.renormalize: After applying all tilts, rescale so total = 95%. No bucket goes below 0%.
